message:
feat(agent-drivers): add Claude Code WebSocket driver for --sdk-url transport

Integrate a new `claude_code_ws` driver type into the agent driver system,
enabling Flywheel Gateway to orchestrate Claude Code CLI instances via the
`--sdk-url` WebSocket protocol. This is an alternative to the SDK driver
that communicates directly with a running Claude Code process rather than
going through the Anthropic API.

Driver characteristics:
- Streaming and interrupt support (like SDK)
- Structured events and tool calls (like SDK)
- No checkpoint support (unlike SDK — CLI manages its own state)
- No terminal attach or diff rendering

Changes span the full driver lifecycle:

Types & interface:
- Add `claude_code_ws` to AgentDriverType union (types.ts)
- Update interface JSDoc to list all current driver types (interface.ts)

Base driver & capabilities:
- Add default capability profile for claude_code_ws in getDefaultCapabilities
- Wire createDriverOptions to produce correct defaults for the new type

Registry & selection:
- Insert claude_code_ws into selection priority between sdk and acp
  (sdk > claude_code_ws > acp > ntm > tmux)
- Update selection priority JSDoc comments to match new order

Gateway integration:
- Register claude_code_ws driver entry in registerDrivers() with factory
- Read defaultDriver from config (via getConfig().agent.defaultDriver)
  instead of hardcoding "sdk" in getDriver()
- Add AGENT_DRIVER env var override in config.service.ts with Zod enum
- Include claude_code_ws and ntm in metrics snapshot driver list

New files:
- packages/agent-drivers/src/claude-code-ws/ — driver implementation + barrel
- apps/gateway/src/__tests__/agent-driver-config.test.ts — config integration

Tests:
- base-driver.test: verify claude_code_ws default options
- registry.test: register mock ws driver, verify explicit selection works,
  verify capability flags (structuredEvents, toolCalls, fileOperations = true;
  checkpoint = false)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+/**
+ * Claude Code websocket driver exports.
+ *
+ * Runs Claude Code CLI via `--sdk-url` and maps websocket NDJSON events into
+ * Flywheel's driver abstraction.
+ */
+
+export {
+  ClaudeCodeWsDriver,
+  type ClaudeCodeWsDriverOptions,
+  createClaudeCodeWsDriver,
+} from "./claude-code-ws-driver";

@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
  * This interface defines the contract that all agent drivers must implement,
  * enabling Flywheel Gateway to work with multiple execution backends:
  * - SDK Driver: Direct API calls to Claude/Codex/Gemini SDKs
+ * - Claude Code WS Driver: Claude CLI --sdk-url websocket transport
  * - ACP Driver: Agent Client Protocol for IDE-compatible structured events
  * - Tmux Driver: Visual terminal access for power users
  *
@@ -33,7 +34,7 @@ export interface AgentDriver {
   readonly driverId: string;
 
   /**
-   * The type of this driver (sdk, acp, tmux, mock).
+   * The type of this driver (sdk, claude_code_ws, acp, tmux, ntm, mock).
    */
   readonly driverType: AgentDriverType;

@@ -146,8 +146,9 @@ export class DriverRegistry {
    * Selection priority:
    * 1. Preferred type if specified and available
    * 2. SDK driver if capabilities match
-   * 3. ACP driver if capabilities match
-   * 4. Tmux driver as fallback
+   * 3. Claude Code WS driver if capabilities match
+   * 4. ACP driver if capabilities match
+   * 5. Tmux driver as fallback
    *
    * @param requirements - Driver requirements
    * @param options - Driver options
@@ -190,8 +191,14 @@ export class DriverRegistry {
       }
     }
 
-    // Selection order: sdk > acp > ntm > tmux
-    const selectionOrder: AgentDriverType[] = ["sdk", "acp", "ntm", "tmux"];
+    // Selection order: sdk > claude_code_ws > acp > ntm > tmux
+    const selectionOrder: AgentDriverType[] = [
+      "sdk",
+      "claude_code_ws",
+      "acp",
+      "ntm",
+      "tmux",
+    ];
 
     for (const type of selectionOrder) {
       if (!this.entries.has(type)) continue;
